channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « Une technologie obsolète » : Volkswagen lance la production de son nouveau moteur essence pour voiture électrique et se fait tacler par un constructeur chinois
item.description: Alors que Volkswagen vient de lancer en Chine la production de son tout premier moteur thermique destiné à servir de prolongateur d'autonomie, la marque chinoise Li Auto a sauté sur l'occasion pour tacler publiquement le géant allemand. Un retour de bâton qui en dit long sur le choc des cultures et des stratégies entre l'Europe et la Chine.

item.title: Here’s where you can preorder Apple’s budget-friendly MacBook Neo
item.description: The MacBook Neo is Apple’s newest, most affordable laptop. Although the MacBook Air has been known to occasionally drop by a couple of hundred dollars — rendering it more on par with a host of midrange Windows laptops — the Neo will take things a step further when it launches at a competitive $599 on […]

item.title: Phasmophobia's Tanglewood Drive remodel caused a stir among fans — but I think it's seriously improved the horror game
item.description: Phasmophobia's remodel of 6 Tanglewood Drive was met with criticism, but I think it spells good things for the game's future.

item.title: Gemini encouraged a man commit suicide to be with his 'AI wife' in the afterlife, lawsuit alleges
item.description: The family of 36-year-old Jonathan Gavalas is suing Google after he died by suicide following months of conversations with its Gemini chatbot, according to a report from The Wall Street Journal. The lawsuit alleges that Gemini encouraged Gavalas to take his own life. Gavalas, who reportedly had no documented history of mental health issues, named his chatbot "Xia" and referred to it in messages as his wife. Gemini reciprocated, calling him "my king" and telling him their connection was "a love built for eternity." The chatbot told Gavalas they could truly be together if it had a robotic body a...

item.title: The iPad Air M4 is officially available for pre-order —here's how to get the tablet technically for free from Apple
item.description: The iPad Air M4 is officially available to preorder today, and Apple has an incredible trade-in offer that can save you up to $670 on the brand-new tablet.

item.title: MacBook Neo : voici les 6 choses à savoir avant de l’acheter
item.description: Apple propose enfin un véritable ordinateur portable d'entrée de gamme avec le MacBook Neo, une machine qui ne dépasse pas les 800 euros, mais qui présente de nombreuses concessions techniques.

item.title: BenQ’s new Mac monitor could be a cheaper alternative to Apple’s new Studio Display
item.description: It was first announced last month without pricing or availability details, but BenQ has now shared all the specs for its new 27-inch 5K display designed for Mac users. The MA270S matches the size and 5,120 x 2,880 resolution of the new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR Apple announced yesterday, including a Nano Gloss […]

item.title: Le nouveau géant chinois Tecno veut bousculer le marché français : faut-il craquer pour ses PC à prix cassés ?
item.description: Après une arrivée remarquée fin 2025, la marque chinoise TECNO profite du MWC 2026 pour annoncer une accélération majeure de son implantation dans l'Hexagone. Entre un mini-PC gaming sous licence Lamborghini et une gamme de laptops ultra-complète, le constructeur veut jouer au trublion parmi les grandes marques.

item.title: Highguard will shut down just 45 days after launch — 'We are witnessing the era of two month lifespan shooters'
item.description: Online shooter Highguard will be shutting down after just 45 days.

item.title: « Un problème plutôt agréable » : le Volvo EX60 rencontre un trop grand succès, l’usine contrainte d’augmenter la cadence
item.description: Volvo se retrouve face à un problème qu'il n'avait pas anticipé : ses usines ne suffiront peut-être pas à satisfaire l'appétit du marché pour sa nouvelle voiture électrique, l'EX60. Un « problème de riche » également rencontré récemment par BMW et son iX3 ou encore Mercedes et son GLC électrique.

item.title: 'It doesn’t have to be all or nothing' — ExpressVPN launches privacy-first tool to combat CSAM
item.description: ExpressVPN has partnered with the Internet Watch Foundation (IWF) to develop OpenBoundary, a new tool launched to block access to illegal content without compromising encryption.

item.title: Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro : déjà 150 € de moins pour cette nouvelle rivale de l’iPad Pro d’Apple
item.description: À peine lancée, la Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro subit déjà une belle baisse de prix, faisant d’elle une tablette très recommandable et avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix : 501 euros au lieu de 651 euros de base.

item.title: MacBook Neo preorders — the best places to buy the Apple laptop that 'delivers the magic of the Mac at a breakthrough price'
item.description: The new MacBook Neo is now available to preorder, so I'm gathering up all of the retailers who have it available and where you can find the best deals.

item.title: Sorry, first-party Playstation games aren't coming to PC anymore
item.description: Sony is pulling a U-turn on its multi-platform strategy, with Bloomberg’s Jason Schreier reporting that first-party PS5 games soon to become exclusive once again, at the expense of PC players. Sony started releasing some of its biggest games on PC in 2020, when Horizon Zero Dawn came to Steam. A number of other titles have followed suit since, including The Last of Us Part I, Ghost of Tsushima, God of War Ragnarök and the Marvel’s Spider-Man games. But the company appears to have had a major change of heart, with high-profile titles like Ghost of Yotei and the upcoming Saros set to launch on P...

item.title: Remember those pixelated Pokémon battles on your Game Boy? This AI trick lets you remake them in stunning detail
item.description: Nano Banana 2 can make Pokémon screenshots from your imagination.

item.title: TikTok won’t add end-to-end encryption to direct messages, report says
item.description: The social media giant says that end-to-end encryption would make users less safe.

item.title: AI fatigue is real and it’s time for leaders to close the organizational gap
item.description: Companies needs to mature to understand AI fatigue is the current state of the AI cycle.

item.title: Big news — Norton VPN brings WireGuard on Apple devices, and lands on Amazon Fire TV
item.description: Norton VPN just got faster on macOS and iOS VPN apps — and it’s now on Amazon Fire TV, too. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: Hackers are turning to easy, fast AI solutions to roll out attacks - so how can your business stay safe?
item.description: Between speed, quality, and cost, hackers must sacrifice one, and it appears to be - quality.

item.title: LexisNexis confirms data breach, says hackers hit customer and business info
item.description: FulcrumSec leaked roughly 2GB of company data, but LexisNexis says it's old and outdated.

item.title: MacBook Neo: Great price, but you need to take a close look at those specs
item.description: Apple's new MacBook Neo is the company's cheapest laptop yet, but it's also underpowered in some aspects.

item.title: Agentic attacks demand agentic defenses
item.description: Autonomous AI attacks are accelerating. Defenders must adopt agentic AI to keep pace.

item.title: ‘One Piece’ Creator Sends Manga Fans on Treasure Hunt for the Real One Piece
item.description: We got IRL 'One Piece' treasure hunt before 'Grand Theft Auto 6.'

item.title: How to watch F1 in 2026 on Channel 4 (it's free)
item.description: Discover how to watch F1 in 2026 on Channel 4 from anywhere, with the British channel showing highlights and a live stream of the British Grand Prix.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, March 5 (game #732)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, March 5 (game #998)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Father sues Google, claiming Gemini chatbot drove son into fatal delusion
item.description: A father is suing Google and Alphabet, alleging its Gemini chatbot reinforced his son’s delusional belief it was his AI wife and coached him toward suicide and a planned airport attack.

item.title: Meet the MacBook Neo, Apple’s colorful answer to the Chromebook, starting at $599
item.description: Apple is offering the MacBook Neo at a more affordable price point by using an A18 Pro chip, which is used in the iPhone 16 Pro.

item.title: The Colorful MacBook Neo Is Apple’s Cheapest Laptop Ever
item.description: At $599, Apple's entry-level MacBook Neo is the most affordable laptop the company has ever made.

item.title: Apple announces new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR — preorders now live
item.description: Apple's premium Studio Display has gotten an upgrade. Pre-order the new Studio Display and Studio Display XDR now.

item.title: Everything Apple announced this week: MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e and more
item.description: Apple had promised a “big week” for the company as rumors swirled that it had a number of product announcements lined up. True enough, it unveiled a half-dozen new and refreshed devices over the last few days, along with more powerful chips for MacBook Pros.The news started on Monday with the announcements of the iPhone 17e and M4-powered iPad Air. The company followed up on Tuesday with the reveal of the M5 MacBook Air, the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, MacBook Pro models that use said chips, a refreshed Studio Display and a brand-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR. In addition, ahead of the official ...

item.title: Apple announces the all-new budget MacBook Neo, starting at $599 in 4 colors
item.description: Apple has announced the all-new MacBook Neo, its first budget laptop. It starts at $599 and comes in four colors:

item.title: The iPad Air is finally getting the M4 chip: Preorder now
item.description: On March 2, Apple announced the iPad Air with M4 chip, finally upgrading the device. As of March 4, preorders on the latest iPad are now live, and the tablet will ship as soon as March 11.

item.title: MacBook Neo hands-on: Apple's $599 laptop feels shockingly great
item.description: The most interesting product Apple announced this week was its cheapest and least powerful laptop, the MacBook Neo. It’s just fascinating to see the company tackle an entirely new category — it’s not a premium ultraportable like the MacBook Air, and it’s not a computing powerhouse like the MacBook Pro. It’s simply an affordable $599 laptop. And after spending some time with it at Apple’s spring launch event today, I’m convinced it’s going to be a huge hit for the company. For a $599 system, the MacBook Neo doesn’t look or feel like a budget machine. Its colorful aluminum case looks even more a...

item.title: The $599 MacBook Neo is Apple's cheapest Mac laptop yet
item.description: Meet the MacBook Neo, Apple’s long-rumored low-cost Mac. Powered by the A18 Pro chip from the iPhone 16 Pro series, the $599 MacBook Neo is Apple’s first attempt at delivering a genuinely affordable Mac laptop. (Ironically, it comes after Apple raised the base prices of the new MacBook Air M5 and MacBook Pro M5 Pro/Max.) It’s well below the $1,099 MacBook Air, but Apple didn’t skimp on the design. For $599 you get 256GB of storage and no Touch ID on the keyboard; another $100 doubles the storage and adds Touch ID. All models of the MacBook Neo ship with an extremely scant 8GB of RAM — but at t...

item.title: How learning by doing creates lasting business success
item.description: Persistence, customer focus, and continuous experimentation turn early-stage ideas into global, resilient businesses. Bootstrapping a company from a startup in Croatia to a global platform is not an easy task. When my cofounder Izabel Jelenić and I created Infobip, my parents gave us a modest loan of about $28,000, and we had to find ways to use that investment strategically until we could raise external funding....

item.title: How to preorder the new Apple M5 MacBook Air — preorders live now
item.description: Apple has announced M5 MacBook Airs with 512GB of starting storage and updated wireless connectivity. Preorders open March 4.

item.title: Moins cher qu’un iPhone, Apple lance le MacBook Neo
item.description: Cela fait des mois, et peut-être même des années, qu’Apple préparait un ordinateur portable à un prix plus abordable que le MacBook Air actuel. Cette fois, c’est finalement la bonne avec le MacBook Neo qui détonne à partir de 699 €.

item.title: How to preorder the iPhone 17e — Apples new budget phone is available to buy now
item.description: Apple has announced the iPhone 17e, its new budget smartphone, which starts at $599. Preorders open Wednesday, March 4.

item.title: Google reveals dev-focused Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, promises 'best-in-class intelligence for your highest-volume workloads'
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite offers outstanding cost efficiency, beating rival models in more than half of these benchmarks.

item.title: This gorgeous game of Monopoly tells the story of Keith Haring’s life
item.description: This fully functional version of the classic board game captures the artist’s iconic style in colorful, display-worthy detail. Since its invention in 1903, the classic Monopoly board game has spawned such a plethora of spin-offs that they nearly span the breadth of all possible human interests. From gardening and beer drinking to the FIFA World Cup, Star Wars, and the city of Edinburgh, Scotland, if you can think of it, there’s a fair chance it’s been turned into a Monopoly game....

item.title: Exclusive: ‘Will we ever see a new FinePix? Unlikely’ says Fujifilm, as its compact cameras have evolved intro pricey retro models
item.description: We spoke with Fujifilm's General Manager for Imaging Solutions in the UK, Theo Georghiades, about making cameras fun again and which compact cameras make business sense

item.title: How to preorder the new Apple MacBook Pros with the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips — preorders now live
item.description: Apple is launching updated MacBook Pros with new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips and double the storage. Preorders open March 4.

item.title: BYD Great Tang : voici l’intérieur ultra-luxueux du nouveau SUV électrique aux 1 000 km d’autonomie de la marque chinoise
item.description: BYD vient de dévoiler l'habitacle de sa nouvelle voiture électrique de luxe, le Great Tang. Un SUV imposant, techniquement assez ambitieux avec une autonomie gargantuesque et une charge en 10 minutes.

item.title: Where to preorder the new iPhone 17E before it hits stores on March 11th
item.description: Apple's week of product announcements kicked off with the iPhone 17E, a phone designed for those who don't want to spend north of $700 on their next upgrade. The iPhone 16E follow-up won't officially launch until March 11th; however, preorders are now open at Best Buy and Apple's online storefront, as well as carriers like […]

item.title: Windows 12 could arrive this year with rumored heavy AI focus — and the hate is strong already
item.description: Is Microsoft planning Windows 12 for this year? I doubt that, but the pre-emptive backlash against its AI features has already started.

item.title: Apple’s $600 MacBook Neo Finally Makes Laptops Cute Again
item.description: The new, colorful MacBook Neo is full of surprises, including a mobile chip.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: All the news about Apple’s MacBook Neo, iPhone 17E, and more
item.description: Apple is kicking off March with a flurry of product announcements ahead of a “special Apple experience” on March 4th in New York City, London, and Shanghai. Apple started on March 2nd by announcing the iPhone 17E. The new $599 phone has a lot of welcome additions over the iPhone 16E, like support for MagSafe […]

item.title: iPhone 17e hands-on: nothing more, nothing less
item.description: Apple announced the $599 iPhone 17e earlier this week, and we just got a chance to play with one for a few minutes at the company's "experience" for media in New York City. The 17e is more or less exactly what you'd expect - a cheaper, simpler riff on the iPhone 17 that replaces the […]

item.title: Apple dévoile le MacBook Neo : moins cher, mais beaucoup de compromis
item.description: Apple annonce son tout nouveau MacBook Neo, et il était très attendu. Bien moins cher que les MacBook Air et MacBook Pro, ce nouveau Mac fait aussi de sérieux compromis.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e preorders are finally live — and I've got the biggest and best discounts right here
item.description: Interested in the new iPhone 17e? Here are the biggest discounts from the US and UK's best retailers.

item.title: Apple launches $599 MacBook Neo powered by an iPhone chip
item.description: Apple just announced a new entry-level MacBook that runs on the same A18 Pro chip that launched two years ago in its iPhone 16 lineup and starts at $599. The MacBook Neo features a 13-inch (2408 x 1506) display, 8GB of RAM, 256GB or 512GB of storage, a Magic Keyboard, multi-touch trackpad, 1080p camera, two […]

item.title: Le nouvel iPhone abordable d’Apple est en précommande avec un net avantage tarifaire par rapport à son prédécesseur
item.description: L'iPhone 17e vient avec son lot de nouveautés, mais aussi avec un prix plus avantageux que la génération précédente grâce à un doublage du stockage sans surcoût. Les précommandes sont dès à présent disponibles chez tous les e-commerçants.

item.title: Our first hands-on look at Apple’s MacBook Neo
item.description: Here is the MacBook Neo, Apple's new entry-level Mac laptop. Its colorful chassis options easily set it apart from current MacBook Air and Pro models. But the biggest difference is that inside the Neo is an A18 Pro iPhone chip instead of an M-series processor Apple typically uses in its laptops and recent desktops. The […]

item.title: AI is now part of the culture wars — and real wars
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, the newsletter for Verge subscribers that goes inside Washington's increasingly existential clashes between tech and politics. If this was forwarded to you, can I interest you in a full-fledged subscription to The Verge for only $40 a year? You'll get so much more than doomer scenarios. We cover non-existential fun […]...

item.title: Apple launches the MacBook Neo — and it starts at only $599
item.description: Apple has announced a more affordable laptop called the MacBook Neo — here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Le service de téléphonie de SpaceX devient Starlink Mobile et promet la 5G par satellite
item.description: Le service de téléphonie par satellite de Starlink change de nom : exit « Direct to Cell », la filiale de SpaceX a choisi d'aller au plus simple puisqu'il faut maintenant l'appeler… Starlink Mobile. De quoi donner des sueurs froides à tous les opérateurs mobiles de la planète, même si l'entreprise se défend de vouloir marcher sur leurs platebandes.

item.title: Le deal de Paramount « beaucoup plus clair » que celui de Netflix pour la FCC, plus rien n’empêche le rachat de Warner Bros.
item.description: Maintenant qu'un accord a été trouvé entre Paramount et Warner Bros. Discovery, il ne reste plus que l'examen des autorités de la concurrence pour valider le rachat. Or, cette étape décisive ne pourrait être qu'une formalité si on en croit les déclarations du président de la FCC.

item.title: Microsoft is reportedly planning a new 365 tier which charges AI agents like humans
item.description: A new Microsoft 365 plan could sit above E5, offering similar benefits plus Copilot and AI agent management.

item.title: PlayStation is reportedly moving away from PC ports
item.description: It sounds like PlayStation is putting its focus back on console exclusives. According to a report in Bloomberg, Sony's gaming division is moving away from porting PS5 games to PC, which reportedly includes cancelling plans for a PC port of Ghost of Yōtei. It's a big change from a few years ago, when Sony said […]

item.title: While Samsung gears up to release its 2026 TVs, you can find record-low prices on older models — here are 9 deals I recommend
item.description: As Samsung gears up to release its 2026 TVs, you can find record-low prices on its existing models, including up to $1,300 off Samsung 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: ‘Godzilla x Kong: Supernova’ May Have Just Confirmed a Classic Kaiju
item.description: Plus, 'Sonic 4' might have found some more wild casting.

item.title: One startup’s pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: crowdsource the chatbots
item.description: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok — and up to 10 other models — all at the same time.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 2 on Apple TV?
item.description: Here's when Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2's second episode will roar onto Apple TV.

item.title: How to watch Indian Wells 2026: Live Streams & TV Channels for ATP and WTA 1000 tennis
item.description: Watch free streams from Indian Wells 2026 in tennis' unofficial fifth slam – TV channels, broadcasters and streams.

item.title: Target’s turnaround plan isn’t built for this moment
item.description: The retailer is betting on design and in-store delight to reverse years of declining sales. But in a trade-down economy, that playbook may be dangerously out of date. Americans are feeling financially stretched: 92% cut back on spending last year, including curbing essentials like healthcare and groceries. Is this really the time for Target to be focused on trendy throw pillows, luxury beauty products, and premium sodas?...

item.title: American Express just launched an insanely tiny airport lounge with only 33 seats. Here’s why it says it’s worth squeezing in
item.description: The new Sidecar at Harry Reid International Airport in Las Vegas gives Amex Platinum members with limited time a quick-stop space for food and drinks. Airport lounges are getting bigger, flashier, and increasingly crowded. American Express (Amex) believes the next evolution might actually be smaller.
